hero.title: Create The Next Football Star
hero.desc: Professional training for kids from 6 to 16 years old supervised by professional coaches

about.title: Invest In Your Child's Future
about.subtitle: About Stars Academy
about.desc1: At Stars Academy, we believe in the passion of football and every child's ability to shine. We provide carefully designed training programs for players of all skill levels, from beginners to advanced players.
about.desc2: Our players are trained by professional coaches with extensive experience in coaching children, while also teaching important values such as teamwork, discipline, and self-respect.
about.desc3: We aim to create a positive and enjoyable environment that encourages learning and growth. We believe football is more than just a game — it is a tool for building character and developing life skills.

pricing.title: Pricing Plans
pricing.desc: We offer flexible plans suitable for all families and believe everyone deserves the opportunity to join.
pricing.heading: Don't wait any longer, start your child's journey to success!
pricing.quote: Nothing is impossible in football, you just have to believe in yourself.

monthly.title: Monthly Payment
monthly.desc: Split the program cost into affordable monthly installments.

quarterly.title: Quarterly Payment
quarterly.desc: Perfect for families who prefer paying every 3 months.

halfyear.title: Half-Year Payment
halfyear.desc: Ideal for families who prefer larger payments every 6 months.

program1.title: Fitness Training
points: A professional team of experienced fitness coaches.
We use the latest scientific and training methods.
Programs suitable for all age groups and fitness levels.
We focus on gradual training and player safety.
Healthy nutrition plans that support physical training.

program2.title: Mental & Technical Training
points: Maintain a healthy weight and fight obesity.
Support bone health and reduce injury risks.

program3.title: Strength & Discipline Training
program3.desc: With our fitness programs, you will:
points: Build a healthy and strong body.
Live a healthier and more active lifestyle.
Start your journey toward fitness and success today.

stats.heading: Stars Academy Numbers
stats.description: Since its establishment in 2022, the academy has been keen on developing football talents, believing that every child has a talent worth developing.
